announcement.text: Team photos - Monday, March 2nd at 5:00 PM after practice! Parent Night at 6:30 PM.

offSeasonMessage: The 2026 season has ended. See you next year — Go Wolves!

sections.title: GroupSpot Communication
sections.desc: All team communication goes through GroupSpot. If you haven't joined yet, please do so ASAP you won't want to miss important updates about games, practices, and events.

sections.title: Concessions, Lunch & Snack Sign-Ups
sections.desc: Each family is asked to sign up for volunteer spots to help keep the season running. Signing up early helps the board so we don't have to track anyone down!
sections.note: Each family: 1 Concessions spot + 1 Lunch for an away game OR 2 Snacks for home games

sections.title: Team Store
sections.desc: Order official GC Lacrosse jerseys, shorts, hoodies, and fan gear through Team Up Athletics. Orders ship directly to you.

sections.title: Rules & Resources
sections.desc: Official game rules and quick-reference materials for the 2026 season.
